name: China Compliance Skills
description: 4 premium skills for Chinese content compliance: banned word detection, AI search visibility, data export assessment, and AIGC detection.
author: feichangai-team

skills.name: cn-compliance-guard
skills.description: Scan Chinese text for 200+ banned words (广告法/消费者权益保护法), check SEO compliance for 5 platforms, get safe replacement suggestions.

skills.name: cn-ai-visibility
skills.description: Analyze brand/keyword visibility across 5 Chinese AI search engines (DeepSeek/Kimi/豆包/通义千问/文心一言), get per-engine optimization strategies.

skills.name: cn-data-export
skills.description: 7-question risk assessment for cross-border data transfer compliance under PIPL/网络安全法/数据安全法. Determines compliance pathway.

skills.name: cn-aigc-detector
skills.description: Detect AI-generated Chinese text using 5 statistical signals: sentence variance, vocabulary diversity, AI pattern matching, uniformity, punctuation analysis.
